metadata.description: Your product gets measurably better every session. 14 agents, 21 skills, startup intelligence layer.

plugins.name: rhino-os
plugins.description: A cofounder in your terminal. 14 agents that measure your product, build autonomously, and think about customers, pricing, and distribution — not just code. Score 0-100 tells you if your product got better. Predictions learn what works. /plan finds the bottleneck. /go builds it. /money prices it. /copy writes the landing page.
